title: ObsidianWikiStatus
description: JSON schema for solar-harness wiki status --json output

configured.description: True if ~/.obsidian-wiki/config exists and vault path is set

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the upstream obsidian-wiki repo clone

vault_path.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault directory

config_path.description: Absolute path to the config file used (real or .test)

skills_installed.description: Whether skill symlinks are in place for each agent runtime

last_exported_sprint.description: Sprint ID of last export-sprint run, or null

last_checked_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when status was last evaluated
